title: Curator File Flagged Event
description: folder-curator could not confidently place a file (it matched zero or multiple categories) and parked it in the review queue (pipeline-status: new) for human/agent triage. Carries the curated directory's declared purpose to aid the decision. ordering_key 'file:<sha256(file_path)>'.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the file parked for review.

reason.description: Why it was parked (e.g. 'matched multiple categories', 'no category matched').

confidence.description: Classification confidence, typically 'low' for a flagged item.

purpose.description: The curated directory's declared purpose, echoed to guide triage.

review_location.description: Directory-relative path where the file is parked awaiting triage (the review/ingest folder).

file_hash_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file's contents (ledger key).
